phase_history.notes: Defined Nova Comp as a premium LA-2A-inspired optical compressor with LEVEL, GAIN, MIX, TONE, Smooth/Punch/Limit modes, Magic mode, and a cooler gold Nova-family identity focused on fast, musical control.
Planned the optical compression architecture with program-dependent release, Smooth/Punch/Limit modes, harmonic sweetening, Magic mode, and a WebView-based Nova hardware UI.

Created the Nova Comp visual system, including the centered triangle layout, hero COMPRESSION knob, refined cool-gold palette, GR/OUT meter, Magic finishing button, and preset workflow in iterative WebView mockups.

Implemented the buildable JUCE compressor with the Nova Level WebView UI, program-dependent optical-style compression, preset recall, GR/OUT metering, Magic polish behavior, and verified Linux build artifacts for VST3, LV2, and Standalone.

framework_selection.rationale: WebView is the best fit for Nova Comp because the plugin depends on a premium hardware-style layout, polished meter animation, refined knobs, and a boutique Nova-family presentation.
